title: promote-request wire contract
description: Shape of the molecule-controlplane POST /cp/admin/promote request wire contract descriptor. CP's PromoteRequest struct (admin_promote.go) is the PRODUCING SSOT for the wire shape; promote_request_contract_test.go asserts the struct's json tags equal these `fields` keys (set-equality). The molecule-admin-cli and molecule-mcp-admin wrapper copies mirror these same six fields. This is the JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) IDL per RFC molecule-core#3285 §15; the instance is the canonical data the schema validates.

_comment.description: Free-form documentation block (array of prose lines). Not machine-validated.

endpoint.description: The control-plane endpoint this request shape targets. Pinned (const) -- the wire contract is endpoint-specific; retargeting it is a deliberate, reviewable edit.

fields.description: Every wire field of the promote request, keyed by its EXACT JSON tag. promote_request_contract_test.go asserts CP's PromoteRequest json tags against these keys (set-equality).

type.description: Scalar/shape kind of the wire field (Go-side: string, a []string slice, bool).

note.description: Documentation / semantics for the field (allowed values, defaults, foot-gun guards).
